🎯 Mailchimp Tooltip Audit

User problem: "I see a number but have no idea what it means or how it was calculated"

Missing Tooltips
17
Unique Metrics
19
Pages Affected
26

Marketing Dashboard (7)All Campaigns (9)Campaign Report (Email) (3)Campaign Report — Click Map (3)Campaign Report — E-commerce (3)Campaign Report — Social (3)Audience Dashboard (8)All Contacts (3)Segments (10)Tags (6)Automations Overview (9)Customer Journeys (9)Content Studio (4)Account Settings (3)Billing (4)Connected Sites (3)Users (4)Landing Pages (9)Website Builder (1)

All Metrics Missing Tooltips — Sorted by Most Pages Affected

Fix the top 3 metrics (Emails Sent, List Growth Rate, Audience Growth) in the shared component library to resolve ~60% of all missing tooltips across the app at once.

Metric# PagesPages Missing TooltipRecommended Tooltip Copy
Emails Sent / Total Messages Sent 19 Marketing Dashboard, All Campaigns, Campaign Report (Email), Campaign Report — Click Map, Campaign Report — E-commerce, Campaign Report — Social, Audience Dashboard, All Contacts, Segments, Tags, Automations Overview, Customer Journeys, Content Studio, Account Settings, Billing, Connected Sites, Users, Landing Pages, Website Builder "Total messages sent, including those that may not have been delivered."
List Growth Rate 18 Marketing Dashboard, All Campaigns, Campaign Report (Email), Campaign Report — Click Map, Campaign Report — E-commerce, Campaign Report — Social, Audience Dashboard, All Contacts, Segments, Tags, Automations Overview, Customer Journeys, Content Studio, Account Settings, Billing, Connected Sites, Users, Landing Pages "Net growth rate of your audience over the selected period."
Audience Growth 18 Marketing Dashboard, All Campaigns, Campaign Report (Email), Campaign Report — Click Map, Campaign Report — E-commerce, Campaign Report — Social, Audience Dashboard, All Contacts, Segments, Tags, Automations Overview, Customer Journeys, Content Studio, Account Settings, Billing, Connected Sites, Users, Landing Pages "Net change in audience size during the selected period."
Contacts 7 Audience Dashboard, Segments, Tags, Customer Journeys, Content Studio, Billing, Users "Total contacts in your audience across all subscription statuses."
Revenue 6 Marketing Dashboard, All Campaigns, Audience Dashboard, Automations Overview, Customer Journeys, Landing Pages "Total revenue from connected store orders, excluding taxes and shipping."
Clicks per Unique Opens 6 All Campaigns, Segments, Tags, Automations Overview, Customer Journeys, Landing Pages "Of those who opened, the percentage who also clicked. Also called CTOR."
Subscribed Contacts 4 Marketing Dashboard, Audience Dashboard, Segments, Customer Journeys "Contacts who have actively opted in to receive your emails."
Open Rate 4 All Campaigns, Segments, Automations Overview, Landing Pages "Percentage of delivered emails opened by recipients."
Opened 4 All Campaigns, Segments, Automations Overview, Landing Pages "Number of unique recipients who opened this message."
New Subscribers 3 Marketing Dashboard, Audience Dashboard, Customer Journeys "New contacts who subscribed during this period."
Click Rate 3 All Campaigns, Automations Overview, Landing Pages "Percentage of delivered messages that received at least one click."
Canceled Order 3 All Campaigns, Automations Overview, Landing Pages "Orders that were placed but canceled before being fulfilled."
Engagement 2 Tags, Customer Journeys "How actively recipients interact with your campaigns via opens and clicks."
Campaign Performance 1 Marketing Dashboard "Overview of campaign performance compared to your historical averages."
Unsubscribed 1 Audience Dashboard "Number of recipients who opted out after receiving this message."
Clicked 1 Segments "Number of unique recipients who clicked a tracked link."
Orders 1 Segments "Total orders placed through your connected store."

Marketing Dashboard

https://us12.admin.mailchimp.com/ 7 missing tooltips

📸 Screenshot captured during audit — numbered markers below correspond to where each tooltip should be added

Tooltips to Add (7)

#MetricWhere on PageRecommended Tooltip Copy
1 Emails Sent / Total Messages Sent h3 (top bar) "Total messages sent, including those that may not have been delivered."
2 Revenue h6 near bottom-right "Total revenue from connected store orders, excluding taxes and shipping."
3 Subscribed Contacts h3 mid-page "Contacts who have actively opted in to receive your emails."
4 New Subscribers div mid-page "New contacts who subscribed during this period."
5 List Growth Rate div (off-screen / collapsed section) "Net growth rate of your audience over the selected period."
6 Campaign Performance span mid-page "Overview of campaign performance compared to your historical averages."
7 Audience Growth div (off-screen / collapsed section) "Net change in audience size during the selected period."

✅ Already has tooltips: Open Rate, Click Rate, Unsubscribed, Delivery Rate, Order Rate, Contacts

All Campaigns

https://us12.admin.mailchimp.com/campaigns 9 missing tooltips

📸 Screenshot captured during audit — numbered markers below correspond to where each tooltip should be added

Tooltips to Add (9)

#MetricWhere on PageRecommended Tooltip Copy
1 Open Rate p (campaign list row) "Percentage of delivered emails opened by recipients."
2 Opened span (campaign list row) "Number of unique recipients who opened this message."
3 Click Rate p (campaign list row) "Percentage of delivered messages that received at least one click."
4 Clicks per Unique Opens label (filter bar) "Of those who opened, the percentage who also clicked. Also called CTOR."
5 Emails Sent / Total Messages Sent span (campaign list row) "Total messages sent, including those that may not have been delivered."
6 Revenue p (campaign list row) "Total revenue from connected store orders, excluding taxes and shipping."
7 Canceled Order span (campaign list row) "Orders that were placed but canceled before being fulfilled."
8 List Growth Rate div (off-screen section) "Net growth rate of your audience over the selected period."
9 Audience Growth div (off-screen section) "Net change in audience size during the selected period."
